title: malache achanioides
intro: Malache achanioides, also known as Indian Malabar, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malache achanioides include treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Malache achanioides can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a versatile natural remedy.
